zhuge.description: Zhuge Liang (coordinator): break the backlog into shippable slices and decide what to tackle next

phases.command: echo '[zhuge/plan] Reading TASKS.md and git log to break the current goal into small, testable slices. Output: updated TASKS.md with numbered slices.'
echo '[zhuge/prioritize] Selecting the highest-value unfinished slice from TASKS.md. Writing the slice spec to .zhuge-loop/current-slice.md for the executor.'

zhaoyun.description: Zhao Yun (executor): implement the current slice and verify it passes tests

phases.command: echo '[zhaoyun/implement] Reading .zhuge-loop/current-slice.md and applying code changes. Committing with a descriptive message when done.'
echo '[zhaoyun/test] Running the project test suite to verify the implementation. Exit non-zero if any test fails.'

guanyu.description: Guan Yu (reviewer): review recent changes for quality and write a summary report

phases.command: echo '[guanyu/review] Reviewing the last 2 commits for correctness, style, and test coverage. Flagging issues in .zhuge-loop/review-notes.md.'
echo '[guanyu/report] Writing a review summary to .zhuge-loop/review-report.md. Marking the slice as approved or requesting rework.'
